stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 file 4.23.
Given the information provided below, the pilot of a jet-engine aircraft must determine which of following en-route alternate airports are the most appropriate diversion airports in case of an engine failure during the cruise phase.

Temperature: ISA +10°C or below
ANTI-ICE: ENG ANTI-ICE ON
Aircraft cruise mass: 43 000 kg
Required airport clearance for:

Airport 1: 21 000 ft
Airport 2: 23 000 ft
Airport 3: 24 500 ft
Airport 4: 19 500 ft
